textByHashes.6bbc3fdc47ce2a86bf522b8807392d7c82e62037: Welcome to the Moonrise Brewery and Winery, the oldest and largest producer of alcohol in all of Varlamore.
textByHashes.8bd43792314449561c5ba2b5a1f445bc959f7ac7: Of course! The Moonrise Winery was originally opened over 400 years ago by Bracus Ramio.
textByHashes.b0b13e69725118f81db80ecfb8e8ae2206b4b4f4: While we originally started off as just a winery, the brewing side of the business was established by Bracus' grandson, Ludovic, when he created the now famous sunbeam ale!
textByHashes.dd90663d9c304f08cd1ec212539e416555381964: Unfortunately not. Ludovic found himself in a tragic and unexpected wine-related incident before ever having children himself. After his death, the business was taken over by a collective.
textByHashes.c64e3836394f64aa8327a336e080fd4b14d6d171: That's right. Some of the most influential people all across Varlamore have a stake in the Moonrise Brewery and Winery these days, though most prefer to stay anonymous.
textByHashes.05dc16f71d8ab85b7cbadab2069f8932278adc42: Ah, well their reasoning is something only they know.
textByHashes.34b54bc567c1dfa42f855be0659feaadca845339: Not at all. Now, is there anything else I can do for you?
